title: Taxonomy of Proximity Measures in Machine Learning
description: A hierarchical chart categorizing the main types of proximity measures used to quantify similarity or dissimilarity between data points.
elements: Non-Metric Similarities (e.g., Cosine Similarity, Jaccard Index)
relationships: Proximity Measures is the parent category of Similarity Measures and Dissimilarity Measures
Similarity Measures is the parent category of Non-Metric Similarities and Correlation Measures
Dissimilarity Measures is the parent category of Distance Metrics
